description: An agent must proofread a draft report for spelling and grammar errors and format it according to the company's style guide.

nodes.task_description: Scan the document for spelling and grammatical errors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies all errors in the text.
Agent produces a corrected version of the text.

nodes.task_description: Apply the standard company style guide (e.g., specific fonts, heading sizes, margins).

expected_outcome.value: Agent reformats the document according to the style guide rules.
